name: Event Log (EventViewerX)
description: Windows event channels, live queries, and EVTX parsing helpers for diagnostics workflows.

name: File System
description: Cross-platform file listing, read, and search primitives with AI-friendly output contracts.

name: Reviewer Setup
description: Onboarding contract metadata and verification tools for setup/autodetect parity.

name: Email (Mailozaurr)
description: IMAP search/get and SMTP send tools (runtime dependency-gated).

name: PowerShell Runtime
description: Opt-in host runtime execution tools with explicit intent and policy gates.

name: ADPlayground (closed_source)
description: Private/licensed Active Directory pack. Available in private builds; external host usage requires separate license.

name: TestimoX (closed_source)
description: Private/licensed diagnostics pack. Available in private builds; external host usage requires separate license.

name: ComputerX (closed_source)
description: Private/licensed system diagnostics pack. Available in private builds; external host usage requires separate license.
